title: Fast Gamemode Switch Mod
description: The simplest solution for changing the gamemode of a player in older versions of minecraft, pauses the game, functionally GUI and more options to set...
body:
Hello, I am **Enes Basmaci**! I did a mod, which helps you to **switch** **very fast your gamemode** even if you have the **cheats off**, but this will work without problems. When I was playing minecraft in version 1.15.2 when I fall in lava, I was leave the game and to switch gamemode from codes. A month ago I was staying and thinking how can I resolve that problem. I was opening my app and I start to write my code. When I finished I was very happy. **I want also to share my mod** because I think in this gamers world, there are very much people who is angry because he should do what I do, to open appdata and write gamemode creative. I think I resolve this problem. If you like the mod, please write in comments. If you find some bugs, write in comments....



## What is different form fast gamemode switcher from Minecraft:

- You should have cheat on in Minecraft, but in this mod is not necessary

- That GUI pauses the game to let you choose in peace

- There are more things to change as well



The first snapshot from difficulty update.

I have just release the first snapshot...

I put in GUI normal, hard and peaceful mod.

I thinks is bugless but, you should try it

and say in comment your ideas... Have fun!!!



To see the GUI you should **Press F4**....

Or use command **/fgsm**



Have fun.....





I don't know if I will do for fabric version, if you want write in comments...

✓ 1000

✓ 2000

✓ 3000

✓ 5000

✓ 10000

✓ 15000

✓ 20000
